mapper.select: SELECT station_code AS stationCode, station_name AS stationName, predict_time AS predictTime, predict_hour AS predictHour, aqi_pred AS aqiPred, aqi_level_pred AS aqiLevelPred, confidence, model_type AS modelType, pm25_pred AS pm25Pred, pm10_pred AS pm10Pred FROM ads_aqi_prediction WHERE station_code = #{stationCode} AND predict_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() ORDER BY predict_time LIMIT 72

SELECT station_code, station_name, predict_time, predict_hour, aqi_pred, aqi_level_pred, confidence, model_type, create_time FROM ads_aqi_prediction
station_code = #{stationCode}
AND predict_time BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AND TIMESTAMP_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
ORDER BY predict_time

SELECT station_code, station_name, predict_time, predict_hour, aqi_pred, aqi_level_pred, confidence, pm25_pred, pm10_pred, model_type, create_time FROM ads_aqi_prediction
station_code = #{stationCode}
AND predict_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
ORDER BY predict_time LIMIT 72
